Generated.Title: benchmark
Generated.Description: Docker testing on Debian GNU/Linux 13 via the Phoronix Test Suite.

System.Hardware: Processor: AMD EPYC 9275F 24-Core @ 4.82GHz (24 Cores / 48 Threads), Motherboard: Supermicro H14SHM v1.01 (1.3 BIOS), Memory: 768GB, Disk: 2 x 3841GB MTFDKCC3T8TGP-1BK1JABYY + 2 x 480GB Micron_7450_MTFDKBA480TFR, Graphics: astdrmfb
System.Software: OS: Debian GNU/Linux 13, Kernel: 6.17.0-22-generic (x86_64), Compiler: GCC 14.2.0, File-System: overlayfs, Screen Resolution: 1024x768, System Layer: Docker

IBPB: conditional; STIBP: always-on; PBRSB-eIBRS: Not affected; BHI: Not affected + srbds: Not affected + tsa: Not affected + tsx_async_abort: Not affected + vmscape: Mitigation of IBPB before exit userspace"}
